text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
When I came to the academy, I didn't think I'd be
able to grow any veggies! Am I glad we have a
garden here!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the veggies grow bigger an' bigger with
each day, losin' track of time fidget'n with the
dirt—there's nothin' quite as relaxing!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don't you join me next time,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Agri-healing—that's what they're call'n it! I bet
it'd do a city boy like you some good!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Agri-healing—that's what they're call'n it! I bet
it'd do a city girl like you some good!
